title: Arduino Multi Player Air Hockey Table
description: 1200×600 mm air hockey table with 100 W centrifugal blower, IR photogate goal detection, Arduino Nano score counter, 7-segment display scoreboard, and buzzer feedback.
objective: Uniform air cushion over full table surface; automatic goal detection via IR; 2-player score display; game start/reset buttons; buzzer on goal.
constraints: 12 V 100 W blower; Arduino Nano; BOM < ₹5000; MDF table construction.
supporting_fact_titles: Air Hockey Table — Puck Lift by Air Cushion and Rebound Dynamics
design_element_titles: Air Hockey Table — Centrifugal Blower + IR Goal Detector
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Air Hockey Table — Centrifugal Blower +: 12 V 100 W centrifugal blower; 2 mm holes at 25 mm spacing; TCRT5000 IR goal detection.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano handles score logic, 7-segment display, buzzer, and game start/reset buttons.
